MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Pro Tem Judge: Larry Becker. Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Leticia Perez. Plaintiff Toshi Onuki was represented by Fredrik Emilson, Esq. and Defendant, Erika Hofman appeared in pro per. The case settled per written stipulation of parties read into the record.
